ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the book's page on the platform */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the book */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series if the book is part of one */,
  "series_order" INTEGER /* Order of the book in the series */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the book's page has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's official website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's social media */,
  "bio_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author's biography was last updated */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher associated with the author (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated with this rating (if applicable) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating was given anonymously */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review was written anonymously */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been deleted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "parent_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent review (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_parent_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, author, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., favorite genres, preferred book formats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)
